### 🏥 STRATEGY 1 — Diagnosis: ICD-10-CM Chronic Sinusitis (J32.x — all subtypes)


> | Code | Description |
> |------|-------------|
> | J32.0 | Chronic maxillary sinusitis |
> | J32.1 | Chronic frontal sinusitis |
> | J32.2 | Chronic ethmoidal sinusitis |
> | J32.3 | Chronic sphenoidal sinusitis |
> | J32.4 | Chronic pansinusitis |
> | J32.8 | Other chronic sinusitis |
> | J32.9 | Chronic sinusitis, unspecified |

---

### 🏥 STRATEGY 2 — Diagnosis: SNOMED CT Chronic Rhinosinusitis (with hierarchical subsumption)

```
Condition?code:below=http://snomed.info/sct|40122008&_include=Condition:patient
```

> Uses `:below` to capture all SNOMED subtypes (e.g., chronic maxillary sinusitis, chronic pansinusitis, CRS with nasal polyps) under parent concept **40122008** – *Chronic sinusitis (disorder)*

---

### 💊 STRATEGY 3 — Medication: Active/Completed Mometasone Prescriptions (RxNorm ingredient, subsumption)

```
MedicationRequest?code:below=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|41493&status=active,completed&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
```

> Uses `:below` on RxNorm ingredient **41493** *(mometasone)* to subsume all clinical drug forms: nasal sprays, branded (Nasonex), and generic products.

---

### 💊 STRATEGY 4 — Medication: Dispensed Mometasone Records (MedicationDispense)

```
MedicationDispense?code:below=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|41493&_include=MedicationDispense:patient
```

> Catches patients where a prescription was filled/dispensed even if the MedicationRequest is missing or from a prior system.

---

### 🔗 UNION LOGIC (Application Layer)

```
Final Patient Set = 
  UNION(
    Patients from Query 1 [ICD-10 J32.x],
    Patients from Query 2 [SNOMED :below 40122008],
    Patients from Query 3 [MedicationRequest mometasone],
    Patients from Query 4 [MedicationDispense mometasone]
  ) → DEDUPLICATE on Patient.id
```

---

### ⚠️ Notes
| Consideration | Guidance |
|---|---|
| **Nasal-only filter** | Standard FHIR has no `route` search param on MedicationRequest; post-filter on `dosageInstruction.route` = SNOMED `26643006` (nasal) |
| **Subsumption (`:below`)** | Requires server support (e.g., HAPI FHIR with RxNorm/SNOMED loaded); fall back to explicit code lists if unsupported |
| **Active diagnoses only** | Append `&clinical-status=active` to Condition queries if inactive/resolved CRS diagnoses should be excluded |
| **CRS with nasal polyps** | Add ICD-10 `J33.0`, `J33.8`, `J33.9` to Query 1 if polyp patients should be included |
